LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_LinkStateReady: Link status: ready to receive a sigil.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_LinkStateBlocked: Link status: circle is not currently ready.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_LinkHint: No circle linked. Link this vault to turn it into a dedicated feeder for one summoning circle.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_LinkDesc: Select which abyssal summoning circle this vault should serve.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_UnlinkDesc: Remove the current persistent circle link from this vault.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_JumpToLinkedCircleDesc: Center the camera on the linked abyssal summoning circle.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_StageToLinkedCircleDesc: Choose one stored sigil and send it from this vault to the currently linked abyssal summoning circle.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_StageSuccess: {1} is carrying {0} from the vault to {2}.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_EjectOneDesc: Choose one stored sigil type to release from the vault.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_EjectAllDesc: Release every stored sigil from the vault.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_Fail_NoStoredSigils: No stored sigils are available in this vault.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_Fail_NoCircle: No abyssal summoning circle exists on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_Fail_NoReadyCircle: No abyssal summoning circle is currently ready for sigil staging.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_Fail_NoLink: This vault is not linked to any summoning circle yet.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_Fail_LinkBlocked: The linked circle is not currently ready to receive a sigil.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_Fail_LinkBlockedReason: The linked circle is not ready: {0}
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_Fail_LinkTargetInvalid: The chosen circle is no longer valid for this map.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilVault_Fail_NoOperator: No suitable colonist can currently carry a sigil from the vault to the linked circle.
